# Embedded-Knowledge, Inc

> E-K helps organizations design and implement sustainable solutions for complex problems.

## Pages
- [Home](https://embedded-knowledge.com/): Mission and overview
- [About](https://embedded-knowledge.com/about/): Eduardo and Erica Campos bios
- [Book](https://embedded-knowledge.com/book/): From Problem Solving to Solution Design
- [Services](https://embedded-knowledge.com/services/): Advising, Corporate Training, Speaking
- [Assessment](https://embedded-knowledge.com/assessment/): Solution designing readiness assessment
- [Contact](https://embedded-knowledge.com/contact/): Get in touch
